---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Babel Deck
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug, invalid
assignees: mta1124-1629472, Copilot

---

##  Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

##  Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

##  Hardware Topology (CRITICAL)
Please describe your system's hardware "mixture" so we can analyze the allocation logic.
- **CPU:** (e.g., AMD Ryzen 5900X - No iGPU)
- **iGPU:** (e.g., Intel Iris Xe - Drivers Installed [Yes/No])
- **dGPU:** (e.g., NVIDIA RTX 4080 - 16GB VRAM)
- **NPU:**
- **Available System RAM:** (e.g., 32GB)


##  Observed Behavior
- **Expected:** (What should have happened)
- **Actual:** (What actually happened - e.g., Crash, "Out of Memory", or Speaker ID mismatch)

## 📄 Logs & Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. 
Please attach the terminal output or the log file from: `%LocalAppData%/BabelDeck/logs/`

##  Environment
- **Babel Deck Version:** (e.g., v0.1.2-alpha)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11 23H2)
- **Driver Version:** (e.g., NVIDIA 551.23 / Intel 31.0.101)

##  Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., "I am using two GPUs but only one has the proper CUDA runtime installed").
